encounter.reason: evaluation of symmetric inflammatory polyarthritis with positive serologies; suspected rheumatoid arthritis
encounter.location: South Texas Rheumatology, San Antonio, TX

screening.name: DAS28-CRP (Disease Activity Score, 28 joints, using CRP)
patient global assessment of disease activity (visual analog scale)
physician global assessment of disease activity (visual analog scale)

medications.name: methotrexate 15 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 15 mg by mouth once weekly on Mondays

medications.name: folic acid 1 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 1 mg by mouth once daily

medications.name: naproxen 500 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 500 mg by mouth twice daily
medications.reason: bridge NSAID therapy for symptomatic relief of rheumatoid arthritis

document_references.description: Comprehensive initial rheumatology consultation documenting detailed 28-joint examination with tender and swollen joint counts, grip strength measurements, disease activity scoring (DAS28-CRP 5.1, HAQ-DI 1.2), review of referring PCP labs and serologies, same-day imaging results showing early erosive disease, new diagnosis of seropositive rheumatoid arthritis per 2010 ACR/EULAR criteria, and treatment initiation plan including methotrexate, folic acid, and naproxen with counseling on medication risks and monitoring schedule.

diagnostic_reports.description: Periarticular osteopenia at MCPs bilaterally. Early marginal erosions at 2nd and 3rd MCP joints of the right hand. No joint space narrowing. Soft tissue swelling at bilateral MCPs and wrists. Findings consistent with early erosive rheumatoid arthritis.
Periarticular osteopenia at MTPs. No erosions identified. Mild soft tissue swelling. No acute osseous abnormality.
Clear lungs. No infiltrates or nodules. Ordered as pre-treatment screening prior to methotrexate initiation.

diagnostic_reports.type: hepatitis B and C screening panel
diagnostic_reports.description: Pre-DMARD infectious disease screening. All results negative. Patient cleared for methotrexate initiation.
